PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-11-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Philip Carey for Diana Bonilla and Cesar Bonilla III (Petitioners).

The Court stated that it is still looking for a supplement addressing the relationship of Mr. and Ms. Bonilla and whether the Grandparents are still alive. Mr. Carey stated that it is all in the petition in item number 8, that the Father of his Client is alive and has been noticed, that the Grandfather is deceased and that there are four Cesars. Mr. Carey also stated that Brother of the Decedent is deceased and had five Children, one being his Client and that all have been noticed. The Court stated that the remaining issue is that notice was mailed prior to the petition actually being filed. Mr. Carey stated that it was his fault entirely, that he mis-calendared it for twenty days rather than fifteen, and that his staff mailed it out while he was on vacation. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.
